overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 131 条，入选 11 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 131 previously displayed items excluded, and 11 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: The United States’ OpenAI Equity Stake, Meta The Neocloud, Karp’s Attack

items.summary_en: Focus: Ahead of the holiday weekend, here’s what’s happening and what to look out for.

items.title: Autoresearch: The feedback loop behind self-improving agents
items.summary_zh: 重点：Introspection co-founder Roland Gavrilescu explains autoresearch, agent “recipes,” self-improving loops, and why humans remain central to the software factory.
items.summary_en: Focus: Introspection co-founder Roland Gavrilescu explains autoresearch, agent “recipes,” self-improving loops, and why humans remain central to the software factory.

items.title: The website of the future may assemble itself for every visitor
items.summary_zh: 重点：Adobe is experimenting with “agentic sites” that generate pages around an individual user’s intent. At AIEWF, we talked to Carlos Sanchez about the Web's future.
items.summary_en: Focus: Adobe is experimenting with “agentic sites” that generate pages around an individual user’s intent. At AIEWF, we talked to Carlos Sanchez about the Web's future.

items.title: Skill engineering and the case against one-shot AI design
items.summary_zh: 重点：Paul Bakaus talks to us about Impeccable, human judgment in a 'loopmaxxing' era, and why agents still need people to steer them.
items.summary_en: Focus: Paul Bakaus talks to us about Impeccable, human judgment in a 'loopmaxxing' era, and why agents still need people to steer them.

items.title: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: Autoresearch and the tension between AI and human agency
items.summary_zh: 重点：The software factory vision met resistance today from speakers defending human understanding and control.
items.summary_en: Focus: The software factory vision met resistance today from speakers defending human understanding and control.

items.title: Routing rules now available on AI Gateway

items.summary_en: Focus: Vercel AI Gateway now supports routing rules . Routing rules are firewall-style rules that control which models your team can use, applied at the gateway level instead of in your application code. items.summary_en: Focus: You have a server in a container. Maybe it's a Go service, a Rails app, a Spring Boot API, or a web server behind nginx. It speaks HTTP. It listens on a port. items.title: SkillOpt: Agent skills as trainable parameters
items.summary_zh: 重点：AI agents often fail because their instructions, or skills, are manually modified with no guarantee of improvement. Learn how SkillOpt turns skill editing into a training process, making agent behavior more reliable without changing model weights. The post
